title: Canary Deployment with HAProxy Ingress Annotations
description:
## Canary Deployment with HAProxy Ingress Annotations

HAProxy Ingress supports weight-based canary deployments using annotations on a secondary Ingress resource. A small percentage of traffic is shifted to a new version without any changes to the primary Ingress.

**Your task:**

A primary `Ingress` named `main-ingress` already routes traffic to `app-v1` in the `haproxy-lab` namespace. Create a **canary** `Ingress` named `canary-ingress` in the same namespace that:
- Uses `ingressClassName: haproxy`
- Has the annotation `haproxy.org/canary-weight: '20'` to send 20% of traffic to the canary
- Routes `PathPrefix /` to a Service named `app-v2` on port `80`
- Has the same host rule structure as `main-ingress` (no explicit host — match all)

```bash
# Verify:
kubectl get ingress canary-ingress -n haproxy-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.annotations.haproxy\.org/canary-weight}'
```

hints.title: Canary Ingress structure
hints.body: The canary Ingress is a normal Ingress with the canary-weight annotation. HAProxy uses the weight (0-100) to split traffic between the primary and canary backends.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: canary-ingress
  namespace: haproxy-lab
  annotations:
    haproxy.org/canary-weight: '20'
spec:
  ingressClassName: haproxy
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: app-v2
            port:
              number: 80
EOF

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: main-ingress
  namespace: haproxy-lab
spec:
  ingressClassName: haproxy
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: app-v1
            port:
              number: 80
EOF

validation.description: Check that canary-ingress exists with the correct weight and backend

commands.command: kubectl get ingress canary-ingress -n haproxy-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}'
kubectl get ingress canary-ingress -n haproxy-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.ingressClassName}'
